title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Shriram Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Shriram Finance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Shriram Finance in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Shriram Finance:
Shriram Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shriram Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
